chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt: Petition.No.D-1002 of 2017. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ 01. For orders on office objection. 02. For hearing of main case. 09.02.2022 Mr. Habibullah Ghouri, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhugri, Addl.A.G Sindh, = * = * = * = * = * = After going through the comments filed by the respondents, it is stated by learned counsel for the petitioners that he would not press the disposal of instant constitutional petition before this Court on merits, provided the petitioners are permitted to approach the concerned officers for redressal of their grievances with regard to issue of mischief or otherwise, if any.

Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhugri, Addl.A.G Sindh, = * = * = * = * = * = After going through the comments filed by the respondents, it is stated by learned counsel for the petitioners that he would not press the disposal of instant constitutional petition before this Court on merits, provided the petitioners are permitted to approach the concerned officers for redressal of their grievances with regard to issue of mischief or otherwise, if any. Order accordingly. JUDG JUDGE
